overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark, industrial underground corridor in a video game. The player moves steadily forward from a wider entry area through a metal doorway into a narrow passage illuminated by red emergency lights and distant green indicators, creating a tense cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial entry corridor with security door

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the dark industrial corridor toward the green-lit security door

entered.detail: illuminated circular logo or symbol mounted on the ceiling at the corridor entrance
white diagonal striped patterns painted on the dark industrial floor
metal door frame with vertical supports marking the transition to the inner corridor
horizontal green illuminated strip above the doorway indicating access
small red warning light on the left wall near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, industrial underground corridor viewed from first-person perspective. The camera approaches a metal security doorway marked by a green light bar overhead, with a circular emblem visible on the ceiling and white striped floor markings guiding the path. The environment is dimly lit with an ominous cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance tunnel with red emergency lighting

events.description: passing through the metal doorway frame into the narrower corridor section with red accent lighting
red vertical emergency lights become prominent on both corridor walls as the space narrows significantly

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrow passage with red-lit walls, moving deeper into the facility

entered.detail: vertical strips of red emergency lighting running along the left corridor wall
vertical strips of red emergency lighting running along the right corridor wall
metal grate flooring visible beneath the camera as lighting increases

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the doorway, the scene shifts to a narrower corridor with oppressive red emergency lighting lining the metal walls. The green light that marked the entrance now recedes into the distance ahead, while the floor reveals metal grating. The atmosphere becomes increasingly claustrophobic as the camera moves deeper into the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dimly lit industrial entry point into a claustrophobic, alarm-lit corridor. It begins in a dark underground space, moving along white striped floor markings toward a metal security doorway marked by a green overhead light bar and a circular ceiling emblem. As the camera passes through the doorway, the environment shifts abruptly into a narrower passage where the lighting transforms from dim shadows to oppressive red emergency glows lining the metal walls. The scene then deepens as the camera advances over metal grating, leaving the initial green light behind while the atmosphere becomes increasingly tense and confined.
